sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95864" key="spermatolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπερμᾰτο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,= <sense id="n95864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σπερμολόγος, τέτραγες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl></cit>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
